transcript: Well, I don't care what it is. [laughing] It's... I didn't order any live lamb from Lebanon. I have no place to keep a live lamb. I have no need for a live lamb. I don't know anybody in Lebanon.
The Lamb Center is located in the heart of Lebanon, and you... must accept freight for your package.
No, I... I... I absolutely do not. You keep the damn thing. I don't want it.
Um... well, when would be the best time to come and show you your package of lambs? There's like four or five in there. It's not that many.
Four or five lambs in one package?
Oh, God. I don't even want to see 'em. I... no, good-bye.
I don't want the damn thing.
